headline: NVIDIA and Global Industrial Software Giants Bring Design, Engineering and Manufacturing Into the AI Era
summary: NVIDIA and Industrial Software Giants Cadence, Dassault Systèmes, PTC, Siemens and Synopsys are bringing NVIDIA CUDA-X, Omniverse and GPU-accelerated industrial software and tools to their customers to accelerate design, engineering and manufacturing. News Summary: Cadence, Dassault Systèmes, Siemens and Synopsys are building NVIDIA-powered AI agents to plan, optimize and verify complex chip and system workflows.FANUC, HD Hyundai, Honda, JLR, KION, Mercedes-Benz, MediaTek, PepsiCo, Samsung, SK h

headline: PepsiCo (PEP) Valuation Check As Year To Date Gains Meet Softer Recent Share Returns
summary: How PepsiCo Stock Has Been Performing PepsiCo (PEP) shares closed at US$159.88, with investors weighing a year-to-date total return of 12.4% against a recent one-month decline of 3.7% and a 9.9% total return over the past year. See our latest analysis for PepsiCo. At a share price of US$159.88, PepsiCo’s 12.4% year to date share price return contrasts with a softer 3.7% one month share price return, suggesting recent momentum has cooled after a stronger start. headline: PepsiCo Activist Deal And Good Warrior Launch Refocus Growth Priorities
summary: PepsiCo (NasdaqGS:PEP) has reached a settlement with activist investor Elliott Management, which holds a $4b stake and has agreed with the company on operational changes. As part of this agreement, PepsiCo is expected to focus on expense cuts, portfolio reduction, and potential leadership adjustments. Separately, PepsiCo has launched its Good Warrior meat snacks brand, marking its entry into a new protein focused category. PepsiCo, trading at $159.88, sits at the intersection of packaged...
